name: Telstra Group Limited
description: Telstra Group Limited is an Australian telecommunications company that builds and operates telecommunications networks and markets a wide range of related products and services. As Australia's largest telecommunications provider by market share, the company offers mobile, fixed-line, and broadband services to consumer, small business, and enterprise customers. Formerly known as Telstra Corporation Limited, the company is headquartered in Melbourne and is publicly traded on the Australian Securities Exchange. It plays a critical role in the nation's digital infrastructure, providing essential connectivity and technology solutions across the country and internationally.
